title: Muscarella quinqueseta
taxonomy: Muscarella quinqueseta is a species of orchid in the genus Muscarella, which is a group of small to medium-sized terrestrial orchids. This genus is part of the subfamily Pleurothallidinae, which is a large and diverse group of orchids. The subfamily Pleurothallidinae is a part of the family Orchidaceae, also known as the orchid family, which is the largest family of flowering plants. The family Orchidaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, with Pleurothallidinae being one of the largest and most diverse. Muscarella quinqueseta's classification reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary history within the orchid family.
